UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT HEALTHCORP, INC. AND DUDNYK ACQUISITION, LLC'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO FILE UNDER SEAL IS GRANTED. PARTIES HAVE REACHED AGREEMENT. A. ALL DOCUMENTS CONDITIONALLY LODGED WITH THE COURT BY DEFENDANTS ON JULY 1, 2113 SHALL BE FILED UNDER SEAL. B. DEFENDANS SHALL FILE UNDER SEAL AN AMENDED DECLARATION OF RICHARD SUTLIFF IN SUPPORT OF DEFTS' APPLICATION. C. DEFENDANTS SHALL FILE A PUBLIC VERSION (REDACTED) OF THE AMENDED DECLARATION OF RICHARD SUTLIFF. D. THE CLERK OF THE COURT SHALL REMOVE FROM PUBLIC FILE PLAINTIFF'S REPLY MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED ON JULY 16, 2013. E. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A PUBLICE VERSION (REDACTED) OF ITS REPLY MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. PARTIES TO SUBMIT STIPULATION RE APPLICATION AND ORDER TO FILE UNDER SEAL. JUDGE HARRY DORFMAN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Application For Order To File Under Seal
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Ted Lindquist (415-399-1159) appear for Plaintiff and opposing party / Atty. Elizabeth Kim (424-239-3400) of Blank Rome via CourtCall appearance for Defendants Healthcorp and Dudnyk Acquistion LLC. moving party/ Atty. William Rauch (415-753-6618) appearing for Defendant Stratagem and opposing party.

Discussion, DEFENDANT HEALTHCORP, INC. and DUDNYK ACQUISITION, LLC's Application For Order To File Under Seal is granted. Parties have reached agreement. a. All documents conditionally lodged with the court by defendants on July 1, 2113 shall be filed under seal. b. Defendans shall file under seal an amended declaration of Richard Sutliff in support of defts' application. c. Defendants shall file a public version (redacted) of the amended declaration of Richard Sutliff. d. The clerk of the court shall remove from public file plaintiff's reply memorandum of points and authorities filed on July 16, 2013. e. Plaintiff shall file a publice version (redacted) of its reply memorandum of points and authorities. Parties to submit stipulation re application and order to file under seal. Judge Harry Dorfman, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Ted Lindquist (415-399-1159) appearing for Plaintiff and moving party / Atty. Elizabeth Kim (424-239-3400) from Blank Rome appearing for Defendant and opposing party/ Atty. William Rauch (415-753-6618) appearing for Defendant and moving party.

Argued - The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PLAINTIFF CREF SANSOME'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER as to Dudnyk Acquisition, LLC is DENIED. Moving party fails to show assumption of liability. See Ray v. Alad Corporation (1977) 19 Cal.3d 22. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Harry Dorfman, Court Reporter Ken Brill (CSR #:12797, Telephone #:866-299-5127) Clerk: N. Bautista, (D501)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Ted Lindquist (415-399-1159) appearing for Plaintiff and moving party / Atty. Elizabeth Kim (424-239-3400) from Blank Rome appearing for Defendant and opposing party/ Atty. William Rauch (415-753-6618) appearing for Defendant and moving party.

The Court adopts its' tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CREF SANSOME'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER as to Stratagem Healthcare Communications is GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden and opposition party provided no evidence to the contrary. Order for the same signed in open court.
